name: Drift
based_on: Drizzle ORM and Vite homepages — modern open-source dev-tool landing pages with a copy-able install command, GitHub star badge, code samples, and a 'used by' logo wall.
summary: A homepage for an open-source database-migration CLI, built for developers: a hero with a one-line install command and copy button, GitHub star count, a syntax-highlighted code example, feature grid, and links to docs and Discord.
sections: Hero: project name, tagline, copy-to-clipboard install command, GitHub stars + 'Get started' buttons
Quick code example (syntax-highlighted) showing the core workflow
Benchmark / comparison band vs the status quo
setup_questions: What's the project name and the one-line description of what it does?
What's the install command and which ecosystem/language is it for (npm, pip, brew, cargo)?
What are the 3-4 key selling points (speed, type-safety, zero-config)?
What's the GitHub repo URL and do you have a Discord/community link?
photo_terms: terminal code editor dark theme screenshot
